name: Two-Bean and Barley Salad with Pine Nuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound dried beans (picked over, up to)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the black beans in enough cold water to cover them by 2 inches overnight or quick-soak them (procedure follows) and drain.
2. To prepare the salad:
a. In a kettle, combine the black beans with enough cold water to cover them by 2 inches, simmer covered for 1 hour until tender, then drain well.
b. While the beans are cooking, in a large saucepan combine the barley with 4 cups boiling salted water and simmer covered for 45 minutes until cooked but still al dente. Drain in a colander, rinse, and drain well.
c. Whisk together lemon juice, mustard, and salt and pepper to taste; slowly add oil, whisking, until emulsified.
d. In a large bowl combine the black beans, barley, and onion; add dressing and toss until combined well. The salad may be prepared up to this point 1 day in advance and kept covered and chilled.
e. Cook green beans in boiling salted water for 4-5 minutes until just tender, refresh under cold water, and drain well. Cut crosswise into 1/4-inch pieces, add with pine nuts and season with salt and pepper to taste; toss until combined.
3. Serve salad chilled or at room temperature.
Serves: 6-8
